General.Name: Snail, Inc. Class A Common Stock
General.Description: Snail, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, develops and publishes interactive digital entertainment worldwide. It offers games, content, and support played on various platforms, including game consoles, PCs, mobile phones, and tablets. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Culver City, California. Snail, Inc. operates as a subsidiary of Olive Wood Global Development Limited.
General.Address: 12049 Jefferson Boulevard, Culver City, CA, United States, 90230
